aboutMessage:
Hello.
          I'm Marat. These are my self-taught designer and developer diaries.
          I love developing new ways of interacting and animating on the web.
          You can usually find me watching movies, reading books, or snowboarding.
          If you're interested in working with me, feel free to
aboutMessageAddition: Nowadays, I’m specializing in creating user interfaces. But you can also order a complete web solution. I develop online shops, websites for the representation of small companies and your personal pages of any kind. The price of the final product depends only on the complexity of the solution and, accordingly, the time I spent on it. For details, start a chat with me on Telegram, which is my preferred way to get in touch, or call +7 (999) 623-20-66
